component.name: Geyma
component.summary: A file manager that remembers where your files have been

description.p: Geyma is a desktop file manager that keeps a persistent memory of where files came from, where they went, and what you did to them.

Alongside the standard browse/copy/paste core it offers a per-file activity timeline, ghost trails showing where files went, reference-based Working Sets, network browsing over SFTP and SMB, and a fully modular, themeable UI.
